content.en:
"The eastern part of the Shadow Ruins has a top-notch Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor, whose strength is even stronger than mine, definitely no less than the Lord of Qingyun, if I go on a killing spree here, I will definitely be stopped. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He had to think of another way to target the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins.

Suddenly, he thought of a solution.

That is to attack and kill the Heavenly Ancestor of another force in the Shadow Ruins as a certain Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins, and then assassinate the Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins as the Heavenly Ancestor of another force, so that the two forces will clash.

After some investigation, he knew what forces were similar in strength to the Shadow Ruins, and he chose the closest force to here, the Dragon River!

The strength of the Dragon River is no less than that of the Shadow Ruins, but it is not in the same territory as the Shadow Ruins, and there is no fight between them.

After all, for them, if it was a fight, the loss of an Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor would be a huge loss.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian copied the body of an Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins, this Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor was named Hai Xin.

Soon.

Ye Tian infiltrated the vicinity of the Dragon River as the Lord of the Sea Sheath, and found a Heavenly Ancestor of the Origin of the Dragon River, without saying a word, he shot directly.

Rumble!

In an instant, this Dragon River Origin Descending Realm Heavenly Ancestor was killed by Ye Tian.

After that, Ye Tian found several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Dragon River, killed them one after another, and then quickly fled.

Soon, this incident caused the wrath of Long He.

Several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors have fallen all at once, how long will it take to cultivate this!

Thereupon.

They began to follow up the investigation.

And if you want to track down and investigate, you must send the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

......

Somewhere in the ruins of shadows.

The six Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Dragon River were investigating, and one of them was led by one of the Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Now.

Ye Tian is nearby.

"That's it!"

He shot directly as the Lord of the Sea Sheath.

Then.

The six Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Dragon River were furious.

"Lord of the Sea Sheath, you dare to attack us?"

Several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Dragon River couldn't believe that the person who shot it was actually the Lord of the Sea Stalk of the Shadow Ruins, this was to cause a big war between the two sides!

But Ye Tian ignored them and directly used the supreme technique on the other side.

In the blink of an eye, these six Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were all killed by Ye Tian, even those Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors were no exception, and the other party was not Ye Tian's enemy at all.

And these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors also passed the news to Long He.

In other words, Long He now knew that it was the Lord of the Sea Worm who had attacked and killed them.

......

Dragon River Headquarters.

After Ju Ying, one of the three Heavenly Ancestors of the Origin Upper Realm of the Dragon River, got the news, he came to the place of the accident as soon as possible.

"It's too late!"

Ju Ying was furious.

"Shadow Ruins, you're going too far!"

Dragon River and Shadow Ruins rarely clashed, but they didn't expect that this time Shadow Ruins would assassinate their Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

He wanted to hunt down and kill the Lord of the Sea Sheath, but Ye Tian had already annihilated himself at this time, and Ju Ying couldn't find him, unless he went directly to the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins.

Then Ju Ying took a group of Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors to the headquarters of the Shadow Ruins to question, if the Shadow Ruins didn't give an explanation, then Longhe would naturally not be so calculated, and would definitely make the Shadow Ruins pay a heavy price.

The other side.

Ye Tian copied the body of a Dragon River Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor and prepared to attack and kill the Lord of the Sea Sheath.

If the Shadow Ruins also fell some Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, they would naturally be extremely angry, and they would not sit down with Long He to talk.

Even if there is a loophole in his plan, if he really investigates, he will definitely find out that there is a problem.

However, when the two sides were losing a part of each other's Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, it would be impossible for them to sit down and negotiate and investigate, and they would only fight directly.

Thereupon.

In the name of an ordinary Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the Shadow Ruins, Ye Tian asked the Lord of the Sea Stalk and several other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors for help.

Whew!!

The Lord of the Sea Stalk and many other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors came out from the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins to rescue the Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

When they arrived here, Ye Tian attacked them as a Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Dragon River.

Although Ye Tian did not expose the treasures of the other side, he could easily kill them all by relying on the top of the top supreme techniques of the other side.

In an instant, the Lord of Sea Simmer and several other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were killed by Ye Tian.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian annihilated himself with this replica body.

......

An area outside the Shadow Ruins headquarters.

Ju Ying confronted one of the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Shadow Ruins, the Lord of the Shadow Valley.

"Lord of Shadows, the Lord of your Shadow Ruins' Sea Worm has killed nearly ten Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of our Dragon River, are you Shadow Ruins going to war with us?" Ju Ying roared angrily.

"The Lord of the Sea Stalk killed some of your Dragon River Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, this is impossible!"

The Lord of the Shadow Circle knew that the Lord of the Sea Worm was in charge of hunting the Bone Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the eastern part of the Land of Eternity, preparing for the Blood Cave Demon Vine to give birth to the Blood Cave Demon Fruit, how could they run to the side of the Dragon River to kill their Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

He even suspected that the Lord of Ju Babies was deliberately looking for trouble, and maybe he even wanted to get the Blood Cave Demon Fruit of their Shadow Ruins!

Suddenly.

A piece of news came.

"Lord Shadow, something happened to the eastern part of the Shadow Ruins, the Lord of the Sea Worm and several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors were attacked and killed by the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors of the Dragon River. An Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor reported.

"What!"

The Lord of the Shadows was furious.

On the front foot, the Lord of the Dragon River said that the Lord of the Sea Stalk had killed their Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor, and on the back foot, the Lord of the Sea Stalk was killed, this is a death without proof!

He directly thought that the Lord of Ju Ying was doing this on purpose, and he deliberately came to find fault.

"Ju Ying, you dare to attack and kill the Lord of the Sea Worm of our Shadow Ruins and several Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors, looking for death!"

The Lord of the Shadows roared.

"The Lord of the Sea Stalk has been killed?"

Ju Ying didn't believe it at all.

He believed that the Shadow Ruins had deliberately hidden the Lord of the Sea Sheath, and had deliberately perfunctory the Dragon River.

As soon as he thought of this, the Lord of the Babies became even more angry.

Bang!!!!

The Lord of the Shadow and the Lord of the Infant fought to the death, and the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors also fought.

Soon, these Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors suffered casualties.

......

East of Shadow Ruins.

Ye Tian quickly knew that the Shadow Ruins and the Dragon River were at war, and immediately smiled slightly.

And this is just the beginning, he is the master who will repay him, this time if he doesn't let the shadow ruins suffer heavy losses, he is not Ye Tian.

In the years that followed.

Ye Tian kept jumping sideways between the Dragon River and the Shadow Ruins, killing the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Shadow Ruins for a while, and killing the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor of the Dragon River for a while, causing both sides to fall into a bitter battle, and they couldn't stop at all.

As for Shadow Ruins' plan to cultivate the Blood Cave Demon Vine, it was greatly delayed.

But.

Soon, they decided to give the fallen Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor to the Blood Cave Demon Vine to devour, which in turn accelerated the birth of the Blood Cave Demon Fruit. ~
